productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men Black Frame Sunglasses
description: Style Note park avenue provides the stylish man-about-town with all the essentials he needs to look his best. Wear these park avenue sunglasses to look stylish while out and about in the sunshine. Product Details Lens colour: Brown Lens style: Tinted Frame colour: Black Frame type: Metal frame with acrylic arms and branding on the arms Flexible hinges for Fit The glasses come in a leather-look case with branding on the front and a zip fastening, cloth included to clean the lenses Material and Care Metal Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth provided Remove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleaner and do not use your fingers Do not place your glasses on uneven surfaces or heated areas (like a dashboard) Size Lens width: 66 mm
